featureName: OPS-001: spec.md status-banner sweep across 54 certified specs
planningOnlyJustification: Portfolio-wide artifact-only documentation drift. Sweep edits exactly one line per affected spec.md across 54 specs (Categories A/B/C/D). No state.json, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, or scenario-manifest.json of the 54 target specs is touched. No runtime code, compose, or config. Per Gate G087 planning-only justification: there is no implementation spec to link because the deliverable IS the metadata reconciliation itself; gate G093 correctly blocks promotion past statusCeiling=specs_hardened.

executionHistory.summary: Spec-review P1-1 surfaced portfolio-wide drift: 54 of 56 certified specs carry a spec.md '**Status:**' banner that does not match state.json status=done. Breakdown: Category A (23 Draft: 001-017, 019, 025-028), Category B (27 no-banner: 021-024, 029-037, 039, 042-055), Category C (3 multi-word stale: 038, 040, 041), Category D (1 spec-056 planning-packet special case). Authored 8-artifact ops packet under specs/_ops/OPS-001-spec-banner-sweep/ mirroring the BUG-020-007 recipe (also tdd.exempt artifact-only, also terminating at specs_hardened ceiling). User will dispatch bubbles.implement separately for the 54 edits + guard pass + commit.

scopeProgress.name: Reconcile spec.md status banners with state.json for all 54 affected specs

tdd.rationale: Portfolio-wide artifact-only documentation drift; zero runtime code changed.
